titles.en: No act with taqwa is small
No act with taqwa is small

segments: : كان أمير المؤمنين صلوات الله عليه يقول: لا يقل عمل مع التقوى ، وكيف يقل ما يتقبل؟! .
arabic.text: : كان أمير المؤمنين صلوات الله عليه يقول: لا يقل عمل مع التقوى ، وكيف يقل ما يتقبل؟! .

segments: 24. And with the first chain of narrations from ‘Ali ibn Mahzyar, from al-Hasan, from Muhammad ibn Sinan, from al-Fudhail ibn Uthman, from Abi Obaidah, from Abi Ja’far Muhammad ibn ‘Ali al-Baqir, peace be upon both, who said: Amirul Mu’mineen (‘Ali) peace be upon him, used to say: "Any act performed with taqwa is not little. How can that which is accepted (by Allah) be called little?"
en.mulla-asgharali-m-m-jaffer.text: 24. And with the first chain of narrations from ‘Ali ibn Mahzyar, from al-Hasan, from Muhammad ibn Sinan, from al-Fudhail ibn Uthman, from Abi Obaidah, from Abi Ja’far Muhammad ibn ‘Ali al-Baqir, peace be upon both, who said: Amirul Mu’mineen (‘Ali) peace be upon him, used to say: "Any act performed with taqwa is not little. How can that which is accepted (by Allah) be called little?"

narratorChain.raw: وَبِالإِسْنَادِ الأَوَّلِ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ مَهْزِيَارَ، عَنِ الْحَسَنِ، عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ ابْنِ سِنَانَ، عَنِ الْفُضَيْلِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ، عَنْ أَبِي عُبَيْدَةَ، عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرَ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ الْبَاقِرِ صَلَوَاتُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِمَا

parts.text: أَبِي جَعْفَرَ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ الْبَاقِرِ
